name_cn:
【Horizontal Lady Dior Bag】White Paris💯
Brand new Lady D-Joy bag, many people have been attracted by this narrow Lady Dior. A viral hit 🔥, the bag comes with a long and short shoulder strap, offering multiple carrying styles 🙋🏻‍♀️. Can be worn crossbody or underarm, looking both beautiful and chic. Fashionable Paris pattern design 🥅, paired with glossy calfskin, elegant and stylish 🌿
size:26*6*14cm
Model:9031
